name: Cross-Session Knowledge Broker
description: Propagates relevant facts between sessions across all channels in near real-time. Zero external dependencies — facts are stored in a shared JSON file on disk.
author: Ilidio

storePath.description: Absolute path to the shared knowledge JSON store

maxFacts.description: Maximum number of facts to keep in the store

conflictWindowMs.description: Time window (ms) in which two contradictory facts are marked as conflicted

extractionEnabled.description: Use a fast LLM call for fact extraction (more accurate, small cost)

injectionMaxFacts.description: Maximum number of facts to inject per session turn

injectionMaxAge.description: Maximum age (ms) of facts to inject into context
